about.label: — about me
about.intro: I'm a data analyst and visualisation enthusiast who believes every dataset hides something meaningful — you just need to find the right angle.
about.bio.heading: Who is Marily?
about.bio.p1: My journey with data started from curiosity — I wanted to understand why things work the way they do. Today that question has become my methodology: I combine statistical analysis, visual design, and domain knowledge to build solutions that genuinely matter.
about.bio.p2: I've worked with small start-ups and large data-heavy sectors alike — finance, healthcare, e-commerce. Each project has taught me something new about how people actually use (and misuse) data.
about.bio.p3: In my spare time I experiment with D3.js, compete on Kaggle, and drink too much coffee with a sea view.
about.skills.heading: What I use
about.timeline.heading: My journey
about.timeline.t1.title: Senior Data Analyst — TechCorp OÜ
about.timeline.t1.desc: Built internal BI solutions and dashboards that cut decision-making time by 40%.
about.timeline.t2.title: MSc Data Science — TalTech
about.timeline.t2.desc: Thesis: identifying customer behaviour patterns in e-commerce datasets with NLP methods.
about.timeline.t3.title: Data Analyst — Startup XYZ
about.timeline.t3.desc: User data analysis and building an A/B testing framework from scratch.
about.timeline.t4.title: BSc Computer Science — University of Tartu
about.timeline.t4.desc: Focus on database design and algorithms.
about.values.heading: What I believe in
about.values.clarity.title: Clarity
about.values.clarity.desc: The best analysis is one even non-technical decision-makers can understand. Complexity is necessary; confusion never is.
about.values.curiosity.title: Curiosity
about.values.curiosity.desc: Better answers lead to better questions. I keep digging even when the first hypothesis doesn't hold.
about.values.craft.title: Craft
about.values.craft.desc: Details matter — in code as much as design. Good work shows that its author cares.
